description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

【Service Suspension】Convenience store service for tax (non-taxable) and income certificates will be suspended.

Suspension period: May 31, 2026 (Reiwa 8) (Sunday) through June 2, 2026 (Tuesday), all day

This suspension is due to system maintenance (fiscal year update work). Only tax (non-taxable) and income certificates are affected.

FY2026 tax (non-taxable) and income certificates will become available for issue starting June 3, 2026 (Wednesday).

If you need a certificate during the suspension period, please use one of these locations:

• Hanno City Hall and each District Administrative Center (excluding Fujimi District Administrative Center): 9:00 AM–4:30 PM
• Hanno Station Service Counter: 9:00 AM–5:00 PM (same-day tax certificate issuing stops accepting applications at 4:30 PM)

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/johosystem/13166.html
summary: ℹ️ Convenience store service for tax/non-taxable income certificates temporarily suspended
